plugins.name: jira-tools
plugins.description: Interact with Jira using Atlassian CLI: create, list, view, comment, and update tickets. Supports configurable default project.

plugins.name: jira-mcp-setup
plugins.description: Install and configure the Jira MCP server (mcp-atlassian) for Claude Code. Adds Jira integration via Model Context Protocol.

plugins.name: netsuite-restlet
plugins.description: NetSuite RESTlet integration reference. Use when building features that sync data from NetSuite (employees, projects, timesheets, OAuth 1.0 TBA).

plugins.name: deel-api
plugins.description: Deel REST API integration reference. Use when building features that sync data from Deel (people, organizations, teams, departments, time-off, contracts, lookups).
